name: Shubha Banerjee
heroHeadline: Backend Systems for Teams That Need Production Confidence
heroSubheadline: I build cloud-native APIs, automation workflows, and AI-ready backend systems, with an eye toward robotics and real-world infrastructure.
seoTitle: Shubha Banerjee | Backend & Cloud Systems Engineer
seoDescription: Backend, cloud, automation, AI-ready systems, and robotics-adjacent engineering by Shubha Banerjee.

about.title: Working Style
about.body: I am a production-minded backend and cloud engineer who likes clear service boundaries, observable workflows, and systems that can be operated after launch. My work is AI-aware without treating model output as magic, and I am interested in robotics and real-world infrastructure where software has to stay reliable under practical constraints.
bullets: AI-aware systems with clear review paths
Interest in robotics and real-world infrastructure

finalCta.title: Build Production Confidence Into the Backend
finalCta.body: For backend, cloud, automation, or AI-aware systems work, start with a focused project call or send the context by email.

scheduling.fallbackText: Email Shubha if the booking link is unavailable.
